title: How to pick the AI agents worth building
abstract: Struggling to find the right AI companion? Worry not, here comes "How to Pick the AI Agents Worth Building"—your key to finding AI agents that can both chat and get things done for you. Just like dating in a crowded world, this guide offers multiple ways to select the perfect AI partners. Dive in and make your life smarter and more enjoyable!
abstract_zh: 你还在为找不到合适的AI伙伴发愁吗？别担心，这里有一把神奇的钥匙——《如何挑选值得打造的AI代理》。就像在茫茫人海中找真爱，这里有N种方法帮你筛选出那些不仅能聊还能帮你干实事的小能手！快来一起解锁吧，让生活更智能，更有乐趣！
